channel.title: hydrazone ligands; manganese; structure elucidation; noncovalentinteractions; supramolecular energy calculations on LMI

item.title: Hydrogen Bond, Pi-Pi, And Ch-Pi Interactions Governing Thesupramolecular Assembly Of Some Hydrazone Ligands And Their Mn-Iicomplexes - Structural And Theoretical Interpretation
